content.problemStatement:
TaskComplete the given function check() which should do the following


Given three integer paramters **`z`**,  **`x`**  and  **`c`** to it.
It should print the following for each tuple  **`z`**,  **`x`**  and  **`c`**

`"PASS"`  if  **`c`**  is greater than either  **`x`**  or  **`z`**
Otherwise print  `"FAIL"`  in every other case.
